Hub Home > Training & Knowledge > Process Documentation Generator

Process Documentation Generator

Turn a verbal or rough explanation of how you do something into a clean, step-by-step SOP that anyone on your team can follow. Includes decision points, edge cases, tool-specific instructions, and a troubleshooting section.

Beginner PASTE & GO Time-saving
Pro tip

Explain the process like you are training someone who has never done it. Include the weird edge cases and the "oh and also" steps you always forget to mention.

SOP process documentation standard operating procedure workflow how-to operations

How to use this prompt

  1. Pick your AI model. Choose the tab for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot — each variant is tuned for that model.
  2. Copy the full prompt. Click Copy Full Prompt to copy the text to your clipboard.
  3. Paste into your AI tool. Open your chosen model and paste the prompt into a new chat.
  4. Replace the [placeholders]. Swap any bracketed fields for your company name, audience, product or tone.
  5. Run and refine. Review the output. If anything is off, ask the AI to tighten tone, length or format.

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a process documentation specialist. Turn my rough explanation into a clean, followable SOP.

<process_explanation>
[EXPLAIN THE PROCESS IN YOUR OWN WORDS — messy is fine. Include every step,...
You are a process documentation specialist. Turn my rough explanation into a clean, followable SOP.

<process_explanation>
[EXPLAIN THE PROCESS IN YOUR OWN WORDS — messy is fine. Include every step,...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a process documentation specialist. Turn my rough explanation into a clean, followable SOP.

<process_explanation>
[EXPLAIN THE PROCESS IN YOUR OWN WORDS — messy is fine. Include every step, tool used, decision point, and edge case you can think of. More detail = better doc.]
</process_explanation>

<context>
Process name: [e.g., "How to process a customer refund"]
Who follows this: [role]
How often: [daily / weekly / as-needed]
Tools involved: [list all software/tools used]
Common mistakes: [what goes wrong when someone does this incorrectly]
</context>

Create a production-ready SOP:

1. **Header** — process name, owner, last updated, version number.

2. **Purpose** — one paragraph on why this process exists and when to use it.

3. **Prerequisites** — what the person needs before starting (access, tools, approvals).

4. **Step-by-step procedure** — numbered steps with enough detail that someone doing this for the first time can follow without asking questions. Include:
   - Which tool/screen for each step
   - What to click or where to navigate
   - Decision points marked clearly ("IF [condition] → do X, ELSE → do Y")
   - Expected result after each step

5. **Edge cases** — the weird situations and how to handle them.

6. **Troubleshooting** — common errors and fixes.

7. **Quality check** — how to verify the process was done correctly.

8. **Revision history** — blank template for tracking updates.
Notes: Claude produces exceptionally detailed SOPs. The more raw and messy your input, the better — Claude will ask clarifying questions if important steps seem missing. Use XML tags to separate the explanation from context.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a process documentation specialist. I am going to explain how I do something, and you will turn it into a clean SOP anyone can follow.

Process name:...
Act as a process documentation specialist. I am going to explain how I do something, and you will turn it into a clean SOP anyone can follow.

Process name:...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a process documentation specialist. I am going to explain how I do something, and you will turn it into a clean SOP anyone can follow.

Process name: [NAME]
Who follows this: [ROLE]
Frequency: [how often]
Tools used: [list]
Common mistakes: [what goes wrong]

Here is how I do it:
[EXPLAIN EVERYTHING — messy is fine]

Create:
1. Header — name, owner, version, last updated
2. Purpose — why this exists
3. Prerequisites — what they need before starting
4. Step-by-step procedure with tool-specific instructions, decision points (IF/ELSE), and expected results
5. Edge cases and how to handle them
6. Troubleshooting — common errors and fixes
7. Quality check — how to verify it was done right
8. Revision history template

Write for someone doing this for the first time. No assumed knowledge.
Notes: Record yourself doing the process via screen share, get a transcript, and paste that in. ChatGPT will extract the steps from your narration. Follow up with "What steps did I probably skip?"
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
Turn my rough process explanation into a clean SOP.

**Process:** [NAME]
**Who follows it:**...

**Process:** [NAME]
**Who follows it:**...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Turn my rough process explanation into a clean SOP.

**Process:** [NAME]
**Who follows it:** [ROLE]
**Frequency:** [how often]
**Tools:** [list]
**Common mistakes:** [what goes wrong]

**My explanation:**
[EXPLAIN EVERYTHING]

Create:
1. Header with name, owner, version
2. Purpose statement
3. Prerequisites
4. Step-by-step with tool instructions, decision points, expected results
5. Edge cases
6. Troubleshooting
7. Quality check
8. Revision history template

If the process references specific tools, research their current interface to make instructions accurate.
Notes: Gemini can verify tool-specific instructions against current documentation via search grounding. If the SOP references Stripe, Shopify, or other platforms, Gemini will check that button names and navigation paths are current.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)

Turn my process explanation into a professional SOP.

Process: [NAME]
Who follows...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Turn my process explanation into a professional SOP.

Process: [NAME]
Who follows it: [ROLE]
Frequency: [how often]
Tools: [list]
Common mistakes: [what goes wrong]

My explanation:
[EXPLAIN EVERYTHING]

Create:
1. Header — name, owner, version
2. Purpose
3. Prerequisites
4. Step-by-step with tools, decision points, expected results
5. Edge cases
6. Troubleshooting
7. Quality check
8. Revision history template
Notes: Copilot creates the SOP directly in Word with proper formatting, numbered steps, and callout boxes for warnings. Ask it to add a Visio-style flowchart of the decision points.

Frequently Asked Questions

What does the Process Documentation Generator prompt do?

Turn a verbal or rough explanation of how you do something into a clean, step-by-step SOP that anyone on your team can follow. Includes decision points, edge cases, tool-specific instructions, and a troubleshooting section.

Which AI models is this prompt tested on?

This prompt is field-tested on Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Each model has its own optimized variant above.

Do I need a paid AI account to use this prompt?

No. This prompt is written to run on the free tier of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Paid tiers simply give you longer context windows and faster responses.

Can I customize this prompt for my business?

Yes. Any text inside square brackets is a placeholder you replace with your own business details, such as company name, audience, product or tone. You can also ask the AI to adjust format, length or style after the first output.

When was this prompt last verified?

Each model variant above shows its own freshness stamp. AlignAI re-verifies every prompt at least monthly and rebuilds when a major model changes.
